title: Substrate or hardscape kind
description: Defines a substance the player can place: substrates (sand, soil, gravel) and hardscape (rocks, driftwood, sticks). Hardscape kinds are 'solid' and don't fall.

bacterial_capacity.description: Multiplier on bacterial colony size per cell. Lava rock high (~4.0), sand low (~1.0).

anaerobic_susceptibility.description: How readily this kind goes anaerobic when buried + still.

leaches.description: Per-tick release rate of these species into adjacent water, scaled by remaining stock.

leach_decay_days.description: How long until leaching falls to 50% (e.g. aquasoil ammonia stops after ~14 days).

buffers.description: Long-term shifts in derived water parameters.

is_solid.description: True for hardscape (rocks, driftwood). They never fall.

angle_of_repose_deg.description: Loose substrate slip angle. Sand low (~30), gravel high (~45).

palette_indices.description: Ramp from darkest to lightest. Compaction picks darker indices; surface picks lighter.

hardscape_silhouette.description: Path to a sprite for hardscape kinds. Ignored for substrates.
